arts.ttl: Jamie Bynoe-Gittens: Chelsea, Liverpool, Arsenal among clubs handed major transfer boost as new asking price is 'revealed'
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund reportedly lower their asking price for in-demand winger Jamie Bynoe-Gittens amid reported interest from the likes of Liverpool, Arsenal and Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Jamie Gittens to Chelsea: Transfer 'EXPECTED' amid €100m 'dream'
arts.sum: Jamie Gittens is expected to leave Borussia Dortmund in the summer and he will not command the €100 million fee the Bundesliga side dream of, according to German media. A change of scenery is needed for Gittens and it has been known for a few weeks now that he will likely leave Dortmund at the end of the season if they miss out on Champions League football.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs Lille Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund host Lille in their first leg Champions League tie tonight. Ahead of the game, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predicted line-ups for both teams, and picked...

arts.ttl: Bafodé Diakité relishing chance to play in front of Dortmund’s Yellow Wall
arts.sum: Tonight Lille OSC will be hoping to bounce back from a 4-1 defeat to Paris Saint-Germain over the weekend, when they travel to the Signal Iduna Park to face a…

arts.ttl: ‘Forget what we’ve done’ – Bruno Génésio warns Lille ahead of Borussia Dortmund clash
arts.sum: Bruno Génésio has warned his Lille OSC squad not to be satisfied with their previous good results in the Champions League ahead of tonight’s visit to Borussia Dortmund. Les Dogues…

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund predicted XI v Lille: Serhou Guirassy to start against former club
arts.sum: Serhou Guirassy will start against his former club when Borussia Dortmund come up against Lille OSC in the first leg of their UEFA Champions League Round of 16 tie on…

arts.ttl: Lille predicted XI v Borussia Dortmund: Osame Sahraoui out, Gabriel Gudmundsson a doubt
arts.sum: Osame Sahraoui, suffering with a pubis issue, will miss Lille OSC’s first leg against Borussia Dortmund, whilst Gabriel Gudmundsson is a doubt for the UEFA Champions League Round of 16…

arts.ttl: Dortmund preparing to sell Gittens in the summer
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that Borussia Dortmund are expecting Jamie Gittens to leave the club this summer.

arts.ttl: Giovanni Reyna almost ended up at RB Leipzig
arts.sum: Giovanni Reyna almost joined RB Leipzig in the winter transfer window, according to Leipziger Volkszeitung.

arts.ttl: Champions League power rankings as Real Madrid and Liverpool eye European glory
arts.sum: Real Madrid, Liverpool and Barcelona are among the favourites to win the Champions League with the last 16 beginning this week as several heavyweight ties await
